name: Ninja Art: Sleep Bomb
statusOutcome: [AttackerName] pulls out a small white ball from somewhere and throws it at [TargetName]'s feet, backpedaling as it releases a cloud of white gas! As [TargetName] breathes it in, [TargetHeOrShe] starts to feel drowsy...
statusMiss: [AttackerName] pulls out a small white ball from somewhere and throws it at [TargetName]'s feet, backpedaling as it releases a cloud of white gas, but [TargetName] manages to hold [TargetHisOrHer] breath!
